title: About Me
subtitle: Passionate about creating safer workplaces through comprehensive safety management and training
description: Computer Science graduate with solid technical knowledge, using digital tools to improve safety and efficiency.
NEBOSH-certified Safety Officer with 5 years of experience in risk assessment, compliance, and safety program implementation.
Skilled in hazard identification, risk control, and promoting a strong safety culture.
